title: phylica axillaris var. maritima
intro: Phylica axillaris var. maritima, also known as the beach phylica or coastal phylica, is a succulent shrub native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phylica axillaris var. maritima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
